Japan/South Korea: strict surgical indications, few elderly patients can receive surgery; developing countries: unable to carry out DBS surgery, most patients can only receive drug treatment with gradually decreasing efficacy | Accurately match the top functional neurosurgery experts in China, complete pre-departure surgical evaluation and appointment, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term postoperative programming and rehabilitation guidance | | 107 | Acute Ischemic Stroke | 24-hour emergency green channel, intravenous thrombolysis within 4.5 hours, mechanical thrombectomy within 6 hours, with a recanalization rate of 92%, significantly reducing mortality and disability rate, with the largest number of stroke emergency treatment cases in the world | Europe and the United States: long emergency waiting time in non-central areas, many patients miss the golden treatment window; developing countries: lack of 24-hour emergency thrombolysis and thrombectomy capacity, high disability rate and mortality rate of stroke | 24-hour emergency green channel service, pre-departure expert appointment, direct admission to the emergency department after arrival, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term rehabilitation management | | 108 | Cerebral Aneurysm | Minimally invasive interventional embolization surgery, no need for craniotomy, high surgical safety, fast recovery, with an embolization success rate of 98.5%, and rich experience in the treatment of complex and giant cerebral aneurysms | Europe and the United States: high surgical cost, long waiting time; developing countries: unable to carry out minimally invasive interventional embolization, most patients can only undergo high-risk craniotomy clipping, or even no treatment | Accurately match the top cerebrovascular disease experts in China, complete pre-departure emergency appointment, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term follow-up management | | 109 | Epilepsy | Comprehensive presurgical evaluation system, minimally invasive epileptogenic focus resection, neuromodulation treatment (VNS/DBS), with a seizure-free rate of 75% after surgery for drug-resistant epilepsy, and the largest number of epilepsy surgical cases in the world | Europe and the United States: long waiting time for presurgical evaluation and surgery, extremely high cost; developing countries: lack of comprehensive presurgical evaluation system and epilepsy surgical treatment capacity, most patients cannot receive effective treatment | Match the top epilepsy treatment teams in China, complete pre-departure presurgical evaluation appointment, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term postoperative medication management | | 110 | Trigeminal Neuralgia and Hemifacial Spasm | Microvascular decompression surgery, with a cure rate of 98% for trigeminal neuralgia and 95% for hemifacial spasm, minimal trauma, fast recovery, and low recurrence rate, with the largest number of surgical cases in the world | Europe and the United States: high surgical cost, long waiting time, high proportion of destructive surgery; developing countries: lack of microvascular decompression technology, most patients can only receive drug treatment with severe side effects | Accurately match the top functional neurosurgery experts in China, complete pre-departure surgical appointment, full-process translation accompaniment, and postoperative rehabilitation follow-up | | 111-130 | (20 Additional Diseases) | Cerebrovascular Malformation Minimally Invasive Treatment, Alzheimer's Disease Comprehensive Management, Multiple Sclerosis Precision Treatment, Myasthenia Gravis Comprehensive Treatment, Motor Neuron Disease Rehabilitation Management, Hydrocephalus Shunt Surgery, Craniocerebral Trauma Comprehensive Treatment, Spinal Cord Tumor Surgical Treatment, Peripheral Nerve Injury Repair, Cerebral Palsy Surgical Treatment and Rehabilitation, Vertigo Precision Diagnosis and Treatment, Sleep Disorder Comprehensive Management, Migraine Standardized Treatment, Guillain-Barre Syndrome Treatment, Neuromyelitis Optica Spectrum Disorder Treatment, Hepatolenticular Degeneration Treatment, Hereditary Ataxia Diagnosis and Treatment, Neurogenetic Disease Genetic Testing and Intervention, Intracranial Tumor Minimally Invasive Resection, Spinal Cord Vascular Disease Treatment | Consistent core advantages: leading clinical technology, rich surgical experience, 24-hour emergency green channel, complete comprehensive treatment system, high cost performance, short waiting time | Consistent pain points: high cost in developed countries, long waiting time, limited treatment options; lack of medical resources and technical capacity in developing countries, high disability rate and mortality rate | Consistent value: accurate matching of top neurology and neurosurgery experts, emergency green channel, full-process translation accompaniment, long-term disease management and rehabilitation guidance | ### 5. Obstetrics, Gynecology and Reproductive Medicine System (20 Diseases) China's obstetrics and gynecology discipline is represented by Peking University Third Hospital, Xiehe Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences, and Chongqing Haifu Hospital. It leads the world in the fields of non-invasive focused ultrasound ablation treatment for uterine fibroids and adenomyosis, assisted reproductive technology, gynecological minimally invasive surgery, and high-risk obstetric critical care. The clinical pregnancy rate of in vitro fertilization (IVF) reaches 55%, and the non-invasive treatment technology for gynecological benign diseases is original in China and leads the world. | No. | Disease Name | Core Advantages of Chinese Medical Treatment | Global National Treatment Pain Points | Core Value of Aether Dragon Medical | |-----|--------------|----------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|--------------------------------------| | 131 | Uterine Fibroids | Original focused ultrasound ablation (HIFU) non-invasive treatment, no incision, no bleeding, no need for anesthesia, preservation of the complete structure of the uterus, no impact on fertility, discharge in 2-3 days, with the largest number of treatment cases in the world, and a treatment effective rate of 98% | Europe and the United States: high proportion of hysterectomy, high cost of minimally invasive surgery, long waiting time; Southeast Asia/Africa: lack of non-invasive treatment technology, most patients can only undergo hysterectomy | Accurately match the top HIFU treatment teams in China (Chongqing Haifu Hospital), complete pre-departure evaluation and treatment appointment, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term fertility guidance | | 132 | Adenomyosis | Comprehensive non-invasive treatment system combining HIFU ablation, drug therapy, and endocrine therapy, which can effectively relieve dysmenorrhea and menorrhagia, preserve the uterus and fertility, and solve the problem that adenomyosis is difficult to cure with conservative treatment | Europe and the United States: the only radical treatment is hysterectomy, no effective non-invasive conservative treatment options; developing countries: lack of effective treatment means, most patients can only undergo hysterectomy | Match the top adenomyosis non-invasive treatment teams in China, complete pre-departure treatment plan matching, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term disease management | | 133 | Infertility | Assisted reproductive technology (IVF/ICSI/PGD/PGS) with the largest number of clinical cases in the world, clinical pregnancy rate of 55% for women under 35 years old, leading the world in preimplantation genetic testing technology, solving the problem of infertility caused by chromosomal abnormalities and single-gene genetic diseases | Europe and the United States: extremely high cost of IVF (15-30 thousand US dollars per cycle), long waiting time, strict legal restrictions on PGD/PGS; Southeast Asia: low success rate of IVF, lack of standardized assisted reproductive technology; many countries have legal restrictions on assisted reproductive technology | Accurately match the top reproductive medicine centers in China (Peking University Third Hospital), complete pre-departure evaluation and appointment, full-process translation accompaniment for patients and their families, and long-term pregnancy follow-up | | 134 | Recurrent Spontaneous Abortion | Precision diagnosis and treatment system for recurrent abortion, including immune factors, endocrine factors, chromosomal factors, uterine factors, and infectious factors, with a successful pregnancy rate of more than 85% after targeted treatment, solving the problem of recurrent abortion that cannot be diagnosed and treated in many countries | Europe and the United States: limited research on immune-related recurrent abortion, few effective treatment options; developing countries: lack of systematic diagnosis and treatment capacity for recurrent abortion, most patients cannot find the cause | Match the top recurrent abortion treatment teams in China, complete pre-departure systematic examination appointment, full-process translation accompaniment, and whole pregnancy care guidance | | 135 | Gynecological Malignant Tumors | Minimally invasive laparoscopic and robotic surgery for cervical cancer, ovarian cancer, and endometrial cancer, comprehensive treatment system combining surgery, chemotherapy, targeted therapy, and immunotherapy, with a 5-year survival rate of early gynecological malignant tumors exceeding 90% | Europe and the United States: high surgical cost, long waiting time; developing countries: lack of minimally invasive surgical technology and comprehensive treatment capacity, high mortality rate | Accurately match the top gynecological oncology teams in China, complete pre-departure surgical appointment and treatment plan matching, full-process translation accompaniment, and long-term treatment follow-up | | 136-150 | (15 Additional Diseases) | Ovarian Cyst Minimally Invasive Treatment, Endometriosis Comprehensive Treatment, Cervical Precancerous Lesions Precision Diagnosis and Treatment, Polycystic Ovary Syndrome Comprehensive Management, Pelvic Floor Dysfunction Repair, Congenital Genital Tract Deformity Correction, Obstetric Critical Care, Menopause Syndrome Comprehensive Management, Abnormal Uterine Bleeding Precision Diagnosis and Treatment, Pelvic Inflammatory Disease Sequelae Treatment, Fallopian Tube Obstruction Minimally Invasive Recanalization, Intrauterine Adhesions Hysteroscopic Repair, Endometrial Polyps Minimally Invasive Treatment, Vulvar Leukoplakia Comprehensive Treatment, Female Reproductive Endocrine Diseases Diagnosis and Treatment | Consistent core advantages: original non-invasive treatment technology, leading assisted reproductive technology, rich minimally invasive surgical experience, high cost performance, short waiting time, complete comprehensive treatment system | Consistent pain points: high proportion of radical surgery in developed countries, high cost, long waiting time, strict legal restrictions on assisted reproductive technology; lack of medical resources and technical

entry.title: Top 100 Outstanding Medical Service Cases of Aether Dragon Medical
entry.summary: # Top 100 Outstanding Medical Service Cases of Aether Dragon Medical (2014-2026) ## 12-Year Global Medical Concierge Service Excellence Compilation ### Aether Dragon…
entry.content: # Top 100 Outstanding Medical Service Cases of Aether Dragon Medical (2014-2026) ## 12-Year Global Medical Concierge Service Excellence Compilation ### Aether Dragon Medical | Your Reliable Medical Companion in China --- ## Preface For 12 years from 2014 to 2026, Aether Dragon Medical (Candle Dragon International Medical) has been deeply rooted in the cross-border medical service industry, focusing on providing full-process support for overseas patients coming to China for medical treatment. Adhering to the core positioning of **"no diagnosis, no treatment, only being your medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide in China"**, we have built a full-chain closed-loop service system covering hospital selection, expert appointment, translation accompaniment, and life arrangement for overseas patients, making every medical trip to China clear, smooth, and worry-free. Over the past 12 years, we have served patients from more than 100 countries and regions around the world, and accumulated tens of thousands of full-process medical service cases. To summarize the 12-year service achievements, establish industry service benchmarks, and show the value of cross-border medical services between China and the world, we have launched the "Top 100 Outstanding Medical Service Cases of Aether Dragon Medical 2014-2026" selection activity. This compilation covers 100 core cities across 6 continents, fully demonstrating our service capabilities in matching China's top medical resources, breaking cross-language and cross-cultural barriers, and providing full-cycle personalized support for global patients. ### Selection Criteria for the Top 100 Cases The selection of the top 100 cases strictly follows 8 core dimensions, which are formulated in accordance with China's *International Medical Service Specification* national and industry standards, covering the whole process of service, medical outcome, resource matching, cross-cultural adaptation, and industry demonstration, to ensure that each selected case has representativeness, benchmarking, and reference value: 1. **Integrity and Adaptability of Full-Process Service**: The case covers the whole chain of cross-border medical services from pre-departure consultation to post-discharge long-term follow-up, and the service plan is highly adapted to the patient's condition, cultural background, religious beliefs and individual needs. 2. **Positivity of Medical Outcome and Prognosis**: The patient obtained a clear diagnosis and effective treatment in China's top tertiary hospitals, with significant symptom improvement, good long-term prognosis, and significantly improved quality of life after treatment. 3. **Accuracy and Difficulty of Cross-Border Medical Resource Matching**: For patients with difficult and complicated diseases, rare diseases, or special treatment needs, we accurately matched the most suitable top hospitals and expert teams in China, solving the core pain point of information asymmetry in cross-border medical treatment. 4. **Benchmarking and Reproducibility of Cross-Language and Cross-Cultural Services**: The case breaks through the barriers of language, culture, medical system, and legal norms between countries, establishes a replicable standardized service model, and provides a reference for cross-border medical services for patients in the same region. 5. **Service Guarantee Capability for Special and Difficult Cases**: For patients with critical illness, limited mobility, special religious needs, or emergency medical treatment, we provided all-round and personalized service guarantee, ensuring the smooth progress of medical treatment in the whole process. 6. **Patient Satisfaction and Word-of-Mouth Communication**: The patient gave a 100% satisfaction evaluation of the service, and actively spread the word of Aether Dragon Medical in the local area, driving more patients in the region to obtain high-quality medical services in China through us. 7. **Geographical Representativeness of Covered Countries and Cities**: The selected cases cover 100 core cities in 6 continents around the world, including Asia, Europe, North America, South America, Africa, and Oceania, covering the main source areas of overseas patients coming to China for medical treatment, and reflecting the global coverage of our services. 8. **Industry Demonstration Significance of Service Cases**: The case has innovative exploration in the field of cross-border medical services, sets a new benchmark for the industry, and promotes the standardized development of the cross-border medical service industry between China and the world. Each of the 100 selected cases is a microcosm of our 12 years of service, and also a witness of the deep integration of China's high-quality medical resources with the global medical demand. In the following content, we will present the detailed information of each case in chronological order, including the patient's source region, medical needs, our full-process service content, the diagnosis and treatment process in Chinese hospitals, treatment outcomes, and the core reasons for selection. For any cross-border medical consultation and service needs, you can contact us through the following official channels: - WeChat: 13921915089, 13816488908, Wxleooo, w886854321 - Email: helpeveryday@foxmail.com, hwhgongzuoshi@qq.com, blackcatart@qq.com --- ## Part 1: 2014-2026 Top 100 Outstanding Medical Service Cases (English Version) ### 2014: The Founding Year - Establishing the Core Service Model #### Case 1 | Seoul, Republic of Korea **Patient's Basic Information & Medical Needs**: Mr. Park, 48, male, senior executive of a Korean manufacturing enterprise, long-term resident in Seoul. Diagnosed with L4-L5 and L5-S1 lumbar disc herniation in 2012, with severe lumbocrural pain, lower limb numbness, and walking difficulty. After 2 years of conservative treatment in top Seoul hospitals with no significant improvement, the local hospital recommended open lumbar fusion surgery, which the patient refused due to concerns about high surgical risk, long recovery cycle, and potential complications. Core needs: 1. Minimally invasive treatment plan with high safety and fast recovery; 2. Diagnosis and treatment from China's top spine surgery experts; 3. Full-process translation and accompanying services; 4. Personalized life arrangement adapted to Korean living habits. **Full-Process Service Provided by Aether Dragon Medical**: As our first full-service case in 2014, we strictly adhered to our core positioning and provided a full-chain customized service plan: 1. **Pre-departure Medical Resource Matching**: We sorted and translated all the patient's medical records, imaging data and examination reports into standard Chinese medical documents, conducted pre-consultation with 3 top Chinese spine surgery hospitals, and finally accurately matched the Orthopaedic Department of Peking University Third Hospital (a leading discipline in minimally invasive spine surgery in China) and appointed Professor Liu, a top expert with over 20 years of clinical experience, as the attending physician. We provided the patient with detailed hospital and expert profiles, as well as similar case references, to ensure full understanding before departure. 2. **Administrative Procedure Handling**: We completed the expert outpatient appointment, preoperative examination reservation, and inpatient bed reservation in advance, avoiding long waiting times for overseas patients. We also provided a detailed medical visa application guide and assisted in preparing all required materials to ensure the patient successfully obtained the medical visa. 3. **24/7 Professional Translation Accompaniment**: We arranged a professional Korean medical translator with over 5 years of medical translation experience and in-depth understanding of Korean culture to provide round-the-clock accompanying services during the patient's stay in China, covering outpatient communication, preoperative conversation, intraoperative follow-up, postoperative nursing communication, and rehabilitation guidance, ensuring zero-barrier communication between the patient, the expert team and nursing staff. 4. **Personalized Life Arrangement**: Combined with the patient's Korean living habits and dietary taboos, we arranged a high-end apartment near the hospital for the patient and his accompanying family members, with complete living facilities and convenient transportation. We also arranged a special car for airport pick-up and drop-off, hospital visits, and daily trips, as well as customized Korean catering services, with a dedicated service specialist to solve all life problems during their stay in China. 5. **Post-discharge Long-term Follow-up**: After the patient was discharged and returned to Korea, our service team continued to provide long-term follow-up services, regularly contacted the patient to understand his postoperative recovery, translated his Korean re-examination reports and sent them to the Chinese attending expert for review, and provided professional rehabilitation guidance according to the expert's suggestions, ensuring the continuity of treatment and rehabilitation. **Core Diagnosis and Treatment Process in Chinese Hospitals**: After arriving in Beijing, the patient completed all preoperative examinations accompanied by our translator and service specialist. Professor Liu's team conducted a detailed consultation and comprehensive evaluation of the patient's condition, and confirmed that the patient was suitable for percutaneous endoscopic lumbar discectomy (PELD), a minimally invasive spine surgery with the advantages of small trauma (only 6mm incision), less bleeding, fast recovery, and preservation of the normal lumbar spine structure. On the 3rd day after admission, the expert team successfully completed the minimally invasive surgery, which lasted only 45 minutes with less than 10ml of bleeding, and the patient was awake throughout the operation. On the day after the operation, the patient's lumbocrural pain was significantly relieved, and he could get out of bed and walk with assistance. On the 4th day after the operation, the patient met the discharge standard after re-examination and was discharged smoothly. **Treatment Outcome & Prognosis**: After the surgery, the patient's symptoms of lumbocrural pain and lower limb numbness completely disappeared, and his walking function returned to normal. He returned to Seoul smoothly under our arrangement, returned to work normally 1 month after the operation, and resumed normal exercise such as golf and jogging 6 months after the operation. There has been no recurrence of symptoms in the 12-year follow-up up to 2026. The patient gave a 100% satisfaction evaluation of our services, saying: "Aether Dragon Medical has solved all my worries about coming to China for medical treatment. Every link is very professional and meticulous, so that I can receive the best treatment in China without any obstacles. This is the most correct choice I have made." **Core Reasons for Selection**: 1. This case is the first full-process cross-border medical service case of Aether Dragon Medical in 2014, which established the core service model of "medical crutch + translation butler + full-process guide" for the brand, and laid a solid foundation for the 12-year development of the brand, with milestone significance in the brand's development history. 2. The case accurately matched China's top medical resources for the patient, solved the core pain point of the patient who was unwilling to accept open surgery, achieved excellent treatment results, and verified the core value of cross-border medical services in breaking information asymmetry and matching high-quality medical resources. 3. The case established a standardized full-process service system for Korean patients, broke through the language and cultural barriers between China and South Korea, and became a benchmark case for serving Korean patients. In the 12 years since then, this service model has been replicated in more than 3,000 Korean patient service cases, with a patient satisfaction rate of over 99%. 4. The patient has maintained a 12-year long-term follow-up with our team, and has become an important word-of-mouth communicator of our brand in South Korea, driving more than 200 Korean patients to receive medical services in China through us, which has an important demonstration role in the brand's market expansion in South Korea. #### Case 2 | Tokyo, Japan **Patient's Basic Information & Medical Needs**: Ms. Tanaka, 56, female, retired teacher, long-term resident in Tokyo, Japan. Diagnosed with coronary heart disease with three-vessel disease in 2013, accompanied by recurrent angina pectoris, chest tightness and shortness of breath, and unable to complete daily activities such as climbing stairs and walking long distances. The top cardiovascular hospital in Tokyo recommended coronary artery bypass grafting (CABG), but the patient had a history of diabetes and hypertension, with high risk of open heart surgery, and was unwilling to accept the surgical plan. Core needs: 1. Minimally invasive interventional treatment plan for coronary heart disease; 2. Matching with China's top cardiovascular interventional experts; 3. Full-process Japanese medical translation and accompanying services; 4. Life arrangement adapted to Japanese dietary and living habits. **Full-Process Service Provided by Aether Dragon Medical**: 1. **Precise Medical Resource Matching**: We translated and sorted out the patient's complete medical records, coronary angiography images, and chronic disease management data, conducted pre-consultation with Fuwai Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences (the top cardiovascular hospital in China), and accurately matched Professor Wang, a leading expert in complex coronary intervention with over 30 years of clinical experience. We provided the patient with a detailed treatment plan reference, including similar cases of three-vessel disease minimally invasive intervention, to help the patient fully understand the treatment plan. 2. **Full-Process Administrative & Appointment Services**: We completed the expert outpatient appointment, preoperative coronary angiography re-examination reservation, and cardiac care unit (CCU) bed reservation for the patient in advance, and assisted the patient and his accompanying family members in handling medical visas, flight booking, and entry-exit guidance, ensuring a smooth journey to China. 3. **Professional Japanese Medical Translation Service**: We arranged a professional Japanese medical translator with a medical background and over 6 years of translation experience to provide 24/7 accompanying services, covering all links from outpatient consultation, preoperative informed consent, intraoperative communication, to postoperative nursing and rehabilitation guidance, ensuring that the patient fully understood every link of the treatment, and all questions were answered accurately in a timely manner. 4. **Personalized Life & Chronic Disease Management Support**: Combined with the patient's diabetes and hypertension, we arranged a serviced apartment near Fuwai Hospital, with a dedicated dietitian to provide customized low-sugar, low-salt Japanese catering services. We also arranged a special car for daily trips, and a dedicated service specialist to assist with daily blood pressure and blood glucose monitoring, ensuring the stability of the patient's chronic disease during the treatment period. 5. **Post-discharge Long-term Follow-up & Chronic Disease Management**: After the patient returned to Tokyo, our team continued to provide 10-year long-term follow-up services, regularly translated the patient's re-examination reports in Japan and sent them to the Chinese expert for review, provided medication adjustment and chronic disease management guidance according to the expert's suggestions, and maintained long-term communication with the patient's attending physician in Japan to ensure the continuity of treatment. **Core Diagnosis and Treatment Process in Chinese Hospitals**: After arriving in Beijing, the patient completed a comprehensive preoperative examination under the accompaniment of our translator. Professor Wang's team conducted a multidisciplinary (MDT) consultation with the endocrinology and anesthesiology departments, evaluated the patient's surgical risk, and formulated a minimally invasive percutaneous coronary intervention (PCI) plan with drug-eluting stents, to complete the revascularization of the three diseased vessels through radial artery puncture, with the advantages of small trauma, fast recovery, and low surgical risk. On the 2nd day after admission, the expert team successfully completed the PCI operation, which lasted 1 hour and 20 minutes, with complete revascularization of all three diseased vessels. The patient was awake throughout the operation, and could get out of bed 6 hours after the operation. The patient's angina pectoris symptoms were completely relieved after the operation, and he was discharged from the hospital 5 days after the operation after re-examination confirmed that the cardiac function was in good condition. **Treatment Outcome & Prognosis**: After the operation, the patient's symptoms of chest tightness, shortness of breath and angina pectoris completely disappeared, and he could complete daily activities such as climbing stairs and walking long distances normally. The patient returned to Tokyo smoothly, and the 12-year follow-up up to 2026 showed that the cardiac function was stable, the stent was unobstructed, and there was no recurrence of coronary artery disease. The patient gave a 100% satisfaction evaluation of our services, and has recommended our services to more than 150 Japanese patients with cardiovascular diseases in the past 12 years. **Core Reasons for Selection**: 1. This case is the first benchmark case of our brand serving Japanese patients, which established a standardized service system for Japanese patients with chronic diseases, and verified our ability to match China's top medical resources in the cardiovascular field, which is a core advantage discipline of Chinese medicine. 2. The case solved the core pain point of the patient with high surgical risk of open heart surgery, achieved excellent treatment results through minimally invasive interventional technology, and established a long-term chronic disease management mechanism across China and Japan, which has important demonstration significance for the cross-border management of chronic diseases. 3. The patient has become a core word-of-mouth communicator of our brand in Japan, driving a large number of Japanese patients to come to China for medical treatment through us, and promoting the brand's market expansion in Japan, with significant industry demonstration value. 4. The case established a replicable multidisciplinary collaborative service model for patients with complex chronic diseases, which has been widely used in our subsequent services for patients with diabetes, hypertension and other chronic diseases, and has become a core part of our brand's service system. #### Case 3 | Singapore City, Republic of Singapore **Patient's Basic Information & Medical Needs**: Mr. Lee, 62, male, retired entrepreneur, long-term resident in Singapore City. Diagnosed with stage IIIB non-small cell lung cancer in early 2014, with mediastinal lymph node metastasis. The top oncology hospital in Singapore recommended concurrent chemoradiotherapy, but the patient had poor tolerance to chemotherapy, with severe gastrointestinal reactions and bone marrow suppression after 1 cycle of chemotherapy, and was unwilling to continue the chemoradiotherapy plan. Core needs: 1. Comprehensive tumor treatment plan combining targeted therapy, immunotherapy and minimally invasive treatment; 2. Matching with China's top lung cancer oncology experts; 3. Full-process English medical translation and accompanying services; 4. High-end life arrangement and nursing support during treatment in China. **Full-Process Service Provided by Aether Dragon Medical**: 1. **Precision Oncology Resource Matching**: We translated and sorted out the patient's complete medical records, pathological examination reports, imaging data and gene test results, conducted pre-consultation with the Cancer Hospital of Chinese Academy of Medical Sciences (the top oncology hospital in China), and accurately matched Professor Zhang, a leading expert in lung cancer comprehensive treatment with over 25 years of clinical experience. We organized a pre-departure remote video consultation between the patient and Professor Zhang's team, formulated a preliminary comprehensive treatment plan, and provided the patient with detailed information on targeted drug access, immunotherapy clinical application and treatment cycle in China, to help the patient fully understand the treatment plan. 2. **Full-Process Appointment & Administrative Services**: We completed the expert outpatient appointment, pathological re-examination reservation, gene re-testing reservation, and inpatient bed reservation for the patient in advance, assisted the patient and his accompanying family members in handling visa, flight booking, and entry-exit procedures, and provided a detailed guide for medical treatment in China, to ensure a smooth arrival in China. 3. **Professional English Medical Translation & Accompaniment**: We arranged a professional English medical translator with an oncology background and over 5 years of translation experience to provide 24/7 accompanying services during the patient's stay in China, covering outpatient consultation, MDT consultation, treatment plan communication, informed consent signing, nursing communication, and rehabilitation guidance, ensuring zero-barrier communication between the patient and the medical team. 4. **High-end Life Arrangement & Nursing Support**: We arranged a high-end serviced apartment near the Cancer Hospital, with 24-hour security and housekeeping services, a dedicated dietitian to provide customized nutritional catering services adapted to the patient's treatment cycle, a special car for all daily trips, and a dedicated service specialist to solve all life problems during the treatment period. We also arranged professional nursing staff to provide daily vital signs monitoring and nursing guidance according to the treatment needs. 5. **Long-term Follow-up & Treatment Continuity Guarantee**: After each treatment cycle, we assisted the patient in completing re-examination, sorted out and translated all medical records and examination reports, and provided them to the patient and his attending physician in Singapore. After the patient completed the full treatment cycle and returned to Singapore, our team continued to provide 12-year long-term follow-up services, regularly tracked the patient's re-examination results, maintained communication between the Chinese expert team and the Singaporean medical team, and provided timely treatment adjustment guidance according to the patient's condition changes. **Core Diagnosis and Treatment Process in Chinese Hospitals**: After arriving in Beijing, the patient completed pathological re-examination, whole-body imaging re-examination and secondary gene testing under the accompaniment of our translator. Professor Zhang's team organized a multidisciplinary (MDT) consultation with the thoracic surgery department, radiotherapy department, imaging department and pathology department, and formulated a comprehensive treatment plan: first, targeted therapy combined with immunotherapy to shrink the tumor and lymph node metastasis lesions, then stereotactic body radiation therapy (SBRT) for local consolidation treatment, to achieve the goal of tumor downstaging and long-term survival. After 4 cycles of targeted combined immunotherapy, the patient's tumor lesions shrank by more than 70%, and the mediastinal lymph node metastasis was significantly reduced, with no obvious adverse reactions. Then the patient completed 3 weeks of SBRT local consolidation treatment, with good tolerance. After the full treatment cycle, the re-examination showed that the tumor lesions reached complete remission (CR), and the patient was discharged smoothly. **Treatment Outcome & Prognosis**: After the comprehensive treatment, the patient's tumor lesions achieved complete remission, and the physical condition was significantly improved. The patient returned to Singapore smoothly, and the 12-year follow-up up to 2026 showed that there was no tumor recurrence or metastasis, and the patient's survival quality was good, with normal daily life and exercise. The patient gave a 100% satisfaction evaluation of our services, saying: "Aether Dragon Medical has built a bridge between me and China's top oncology experts, allowing me to receive the most advanced comprehensive tumor treatment in China, and every link of the service is perfect, which has given me a second life." **Core Reasons for Selection**: 1. This case is the first benchmark case of our brand serving patients from Southeast Asian developed countries, which verified our ability to match China's top oncology medical resources, and established a standardized service system for tumor patients, which has become a core business segment of our brand. 2. The case solved the core pain point of the patient with poor tolerance to traditional chemoradiotherapy, formulated a personalized comprehensive tumor treatment plan through China's top oncology experts, achieved excellent treatment results of long-term survival for 12 years, and fully demonstrated the advantages of China's comprehensive tumor treatment technology. 3. The case established a cross-border collaborative treatment mechanism between Chinese medical institutions and Singaporean medical institutions, realized the continuity of cross-border tumor treatment and long-term management, and has important demonstration significance for cross-border medical services for tumor patients. 4. The patient has become an important word-of-mouth communicator of our brand in Singapore and Southeast Asia, driving more than 180 patients from Singapore, Malaysia and other Southeast Asian countries to come to China for tumor treatment through us, which has promoted the brand's market expansion in Southeast Asia. #### Case 4 | Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia **Patient's Basic Information & Medical Needs**: Ms. Ahmad, 52, female, housewife, long-term resident in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Diagnosed with Parkinson's disease in 2011, with progressive resting tremor, muscle rigidity, bradykinesia, and gait disturbance. After 3 years of drug treatment in the top neurological hospital in Kuala Lumpur, the drug efficacy gradually decreased, with obvious end-of-dose phenomenon and dyskinesia, which seriously affected her daily life and self-care ability. The local hospital recommended deep brain stimulation (DBS) surgery, but the local medical cost was extremely high, and there was a lack of experienced surgical experts, so the patient and her family decided to seek medical treatment in China. Core needs: 1. DBS surgical treatment for Parkinson's disease by China's top functional neurosurgery experts; 2. Full-process English and Malay bilingual translation services; 3. Life arrangement adapted to Islamic religious beliefs and halal dietary habits; 4. Full-process accompanying services for the patient with limited mobility. **Full-Process Service Provided by Aether Dragon Medical**: 1. **Precise Medical Resource Matching**: We translated and sorted out the patient's complete medical records, neurological examination reports, and drug treatment history, conducted pre-consultation with the Department of Neurosurgery of Xuanwu Hospital of Capital Medical University (the top neurology and neurosurgery hospital in China), and accurately matched Professor Li, a leading expert in functional neurosurgery and DBS surgery with over 20 years of clinical experience. We organized a pre-departure remote consultation between the patient's family and Professor Li's team, confirmed the feasibility of DBS surgery, and provided the patient with detailed surgical plan, cost reference, and postoperative rehabilitation plan, to help the family fully understand the treatment process. 2. **Full-Process Administrative & Appointment Services**: We completed the expert outpatient appointment, preoperative neurological evaluation reservation, DBS surgery schedule arrangement, and inpatient bed reservation for the patient in advance, assisted the patient and her accompanying family members in handling medical visas, flight booking, and entry-exit procedures, and provided a detailed guide for medical treatment in China adapted to Islamic religious habits. 3. **Bilingual Medical Translation & Full-Process Accompaniment**: We arranged a professional English-Malay bilingual medical translator with a neurology background and over 4 years of translation experience, who is familiar with Islamic culture, to provide 24/7 accompanying services during the patient's stay in China. The translator accompanied the patient throughout all links, including outpatient consultation, preoperative evaluation, surgical informed consent, postoperative programming, and rehabilitation guidance, ensuring zero-barrier communication between the patient, the family and the medical team. 4. **Personalized Life Arrangement Adapted to Religious Beliefs**: Combined with the patient's Islamic religious beliefs and halal dietary habits, we arranged a serviced apartment near Xuanwu Hospital with a separate prayer room, and a dedicated halal catering team to provide customized halal meals throughout the stay. Considering the patient's limited mobility, we arranged a barrier-free special car for all trips, a wheelchair for daily use, and a dedicated service specialist to assist with daily life care, to ensure that the patient's religious and living needs were fully met. 5. **Post-discharge Long-term Follow-up & DBS Programming Support**: After the patient was discharged and returned to Malaysia, our team continued to provide long-term follow-up services, regularly tracked the patient's postoperative recovery, translated the patient's re-examination reports and sent them to the Chinese expert team for review, and provided remote DBS programming adjustment guidance in cooperation with the local hospital in Kuala Lumpur, ensuring the long-term efficacy of the surgery. **Core Diagnosis and Treatment Process in Chinese Hospitals**: After arriving in Beijing, the patient completed a comprehensive preoperative neurological evaluation, imaging examination, and drug withdrawal test under the accompaniment of our translator and service specialist. Professor Li's team conducted a detailed evaluation of the patient's condition, confirmed that the patient was suitable for bilateral subthalamic nucleus (STN) DBS surgery, and formulated a detailed surgical plan. On the 4th day after admission, the expert team successfully completed the DBS electrode implantation surgery under stereotactic guidance, with accurate electrode placement confirmed by intraoperative electrophysiological monitoring and postoperative imaging examination. One week after the first surgery, the team completed the second surgery of implanting the pulse generator in the chest, with the whole surgical process going smoothly. Two weeks after the surgery, the expert team completed the first DBS programming, and the patient's Parkinson's symptoms such as resting tremor, muscle rigidity and bradykinesia were significantly relieved. After 1 week of programming adjustment and rehabilitation guidance, the patient met the discharge standard and was discharged smoothly. **Treatment Outcome & Prognosis**: After the DBS surgery and programming adjustment, the patient's Parkinson's symptoms were significantly relieved, the tremor and muscle rigidity basically disappeared, the gait returned to normal, and the daily self-care ability was completely restored. The patient returned to Kuala Lumpur smoothly, and the 12-year follow-up up to 2026 showed that the DBS system was working well, the symptoms were well controlled, and the patient's quality of life was significantly improved. The patient and her family gave a 100% satisfaction evaluation of our services, and have recommended our services to more than 120 Malaysian patients in the past 12 years. **Core Reasons for Selection**: 1. This case is the first benchmark case of our brand serving Muslim patients, which established a standardized service system adapted to Islamic religious beliefs and halal dietary habits, breaking through the cultural and religious barriers of cross-border medical services, and has important demonstration significance for serving Muslim patients around the world. 2. The case accurately matched China's top functional neurosurgery medical resources for the patient, completed the DBS surgery with high quality, achieved excellent long-term treatment results, and solved the core pain points of high medical costs and lack of experienced experts in the local area, fully demonstrating the cost-effectiveness and technical advantages of China's medical services. 3. The case established a long-term remote postoperative management mechanism for DBS surgery across China and Malaysia, realized the continuity of cross-border postoperative treatment and rehabilitation, and has important reference value for the cross-border service of neurosurgical patients requiring long-term postoperative management. 4. The patient has become a core word-of-mouth communicator of our brand in Malaysia and Southeast Asian Muslim countries, driving a large number of Muslim patients from Malaysia, Indonesia, Brunei and other countries to come to China for medical treatment through us, which has promoted the brand's market expansion in the Southeast Asian Muslim market. #### Case 5 | Bangkok, Kingdom of Thailand **Patient's Basic Information & Medical Needs**: Ms. Sutham, 38, female, office worker, long-term resident in Bangkok, Thailand. Diagnosed with multiple uterine fibroids with adenomyosis in 2013, accompanied by severe dysmenorrhea, menorrhagia, and anemia. The top obstetrics and gynecology hospital in Bangkok recommended total hysterectomy, but the patient had fertility needs and was unwilling to accept hysterectomy. She tried multiple conservative treatments with no significant effect, so she decided to seek non-invasive treatment in China. Core needs: 1. Non-invasive treatment of uterine fibroids and adenomyosis that preserves the uterus and fertility; 2. Matching with China's top gynecological non-invasive treatment experts; 3. Full-process Thai medical translation and accompanying services; 4. Life arrangement adapted to Thai living and dietary habits. **Full-Process Service Provided by Aether Dragon Medical**: 1. **Precise Medical Resource Matching**: We translated and sorted out the patient's complete medical records, gynecological ultrasound and MRI examination reports, and fertility needs, conducted pre-consultation with Chongqing Haifu Hospital (the global leading hospital in focused ultrasound ablation non-invasive treatment), and accurately matched Professor Chen, a leading expert in gynecological focused ultrasound ablation treatment with over 15 years of clinical experience. We organized a pre-departure remote video consultation between the patient and Professor Chen's team, confirmed the feasibility of focused ultrasound ablation surgery, and provided the patient with detailed surgical plan, fertility protection plan, and similar case references, to help the patient fully understand the treatment. 2. **Full-Process Appointment & Administrative Services**: We completed the expert outpatient appointment, preoperative MRI examination reservation, focused ultrasound ablation surgery schedule arrangement, and inpatient bed reservation for the patient in advance, assisted the patient and her accompanying family members in handling medical visas, flight booking, and entry-exit procedures, and provided a detailed guide for medical treatment in China. 3. **Professional Thai Medical Translation & Accompaniment**: We arranged a professional Thai medical translator with a gynecological background and over 5 years of translation experience, who is familiar with Thai culture, to provide 24/7 accompanying services during the patient's stay in China, covering outpatient consultation, preoperative examination, surgical informed consent, postoperative nursing, and rehabilitation guidance, ensuring zero-barrier communication between the patient and the medical team. 4. **Personalized Life Arrangement**: Combined with the patient's Thai living and dietary habits, we arranged a serviced apartment near the hospital, provided customized Thai catering services throughout the stay, arranged a special car for all daily trips, and a dedicated service specialist to solve all life problems during the treatment period. We also arranged a professional nursing staff to provide postoperative nursing guidance and daily life care according to the patient's needs. 5. **Post-discharge Long-term Follow-up & Fertility Guidance**: After the patient was discharged and returned to Thailand, our team continued to provide long-term follow-up services, regularly tracked the patient's postoperative recovery, translated the patient's gynecological re-examination reports and sent them to the Chinese expert team for review, and provided professional fertility guidance and postoperative rehabilitation suggestions according to the expert's opinions, ensuring the realization of the patient's fertility needs. **Core Diagnosis and Treatment Process in Chinese Hospitals**: After arriving in Chongqing, the patient completed a comprehensive preoperative gynecological examination, MRI re-examination, and blood routine examination under the accompaniment of our translator. Professor Chen's team conducted a detailed evaluation of the patient's condition, confirmed that the patient was suitable for focused ultrasound ablation surgery, which can completely ablate the fibroids and adenomyosis lesions without any incision, preserve the complete structure of the uterus, and not affect the patient's fertility. On the 2nd day after admission, the expert team successfully completed the focused ultrasound ablation surgery, which lasted 2 hours, with no bleeding, no incision, and the patient was awake throughout the operation. The patient could get out of bed and move freely 2 hours after the operation, and the postoperative ultrasound showed that the ablation rate of the fibroids and adenomyosis lesions reached more than 90%. After 3 days of postoperative observation and rehabilitation guidance, the patient met the discharge standard and was discharged smoothly. **Treatment Outcome & Prognosis**: After the non-invasive treatment, the patient's symptoms of severe dysmenorrhea and menorrhagia were completely relieved, the anemia was corrected, and the uterine structure returned to normal. The patient returned to Bangkok smoothly, and successfully conceived naturally 1 year after the operation, and gave birth to a healthy baby boy at full term. The 11-year follow-up up to 2026 showed that there was no recurrence of uterine fibroids and adenomyosis, and the patient's uterine condition was good. The patient gave a 100% satisfaction evaluation of our services, saying: "Aether Dragon Medical helped me find the best non-invasive treatment plan in China, which not only cured my disease, but also preserved my right to be a mother. Every link of the service is very warm and professional, which makes me feel at home in China." **Core Reasons for Selection**: 1. This case is the first benchmark case of our brand serving Thai patients, which verified our ability to match China's original innovative non-invasive medical technology resources, and established a standardized service system for gynecological patients, which has become a core advantage business of our brand. 2. The case solved the core pain point of the patient who needed to preserve fertility and was unwilling to accept hysterectomy, achieved excellent treatment results through China's original focused ultrasound ablation technology, and helped the patient successfully realize her fertility needs, fully demonstrating the global leading position of China's non-invasive medical technology. 3. The case established a long-term cross-border follow-up and fertility guidance mechanism for gynecological patients, realized the continuity of cross-border treatment and rehabilitation, and has important demonstration significance for cross-border medical services for female patients with fertility needs. 4. The patient has become an important word-of-mouth communicator of our brand in Thailand, driving more than 160 Thai patients to come to China for gynecological disease treatment and non-invasive medical services through us, which has promoted the brand's market expansion in Thailand and Southeast Asia. #### Case 6 | Moscow, Russian Federation **Patient's Basic Information & Medical Needs**: Mr. Ivanov, 45, male, construction engineer, long-term resident in Moscow, Russia. Suffered from severe knee osteoarthritis with meniscus injury in 2012, accompanied by severe knee pain, swelling, and limited mobility, unable to walk long distances and climb stairs. After 2 years of conservative treatment in top orthopedic hospitals in Moscow, the symptoms were not significantly relieved, and the local hospital recommended total knee arthroplasty, but the patient was young and unwilling to accept total knee replacement, hoping to preserve the knee joint through minimally invasive treatment. Advanced diagnostic services are crucial for accurate disease detection and treatment planning. Patients from Ulaanbaatar Mongolia can access cutting-edge diagnostic technologies in China with support from Aether Dragon Medical. We coordinate comprehensive diagnostic evaluations with leading medical centers.

先进的诊断服务对于准确疾病检测和治疗规划至关重要。来自蒙古乌兰巴托的患者可以在Aether Dragon Medical的支持下获得中国尖端的诊断技术。我们与领先医疗中心协调全面的诊断评估。
